name: Patient Case
history: History of self-critical tendencies. Used to maintaining control and achieving goals. Current challenges involve job seeking, personal relationships, and family dynamics.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't maintain control, things will fall apart.
intermediate_belief_depression: I must achieve my goals to be valued.
coping_strategies: Attempts to exert control over situations and others.
situation: Conflict related to another person's (Ivan's) approach to job searching and life decisions.
auto_thought: Ivan's approach is wrong and will lead to failure.
behavior: Attempts to control or criticize Ivan's decisions.
